title: Iran’s Underground Air Force Base Was Hit Earlier in the War
summary_full: Satellite imagery shows impact craters at and near the tunnel entrances to aircraft shelters at Iran’s remote “Eagle 44” base.
summary_public: Satellite imagery shows impact craters at and near the tunnel entrances to aircraft shelters at Iran’s remote “Eagle 44” base.

IR.label: neutral
